project.title: Pobi Bamboo Breakfast
project.style_notes: polished storybook animation, gentle cinematic motion, soft textures, clear focal composition
project.narration_notes: Keep each line short and clear enough to sit comfortably over the shot. Let narration carry the story so visuals stay expressive and simple.
project.consistency_notes: Pobi is a small round panda cub with soft black-and-white fur, bright curious eyes, and a tiny green scarf. Keep his face shape, body proportions, and scarf consistent across all shots.
constraints: no text, no subtitles, no watermark
no scary imagery or aggressive action
project.audio_notes: Gentle bamboo forest ambience and soft birdsong under external narration.

shots.title: Pobi wakes up
shots.subject: Pobi, a small round panda cub
shots.action: wakes up in a bamboo bed, stretches his paws, and smiles sleepily
shots.setting: a cozy bamboo hut on a green mountain at sunrise
shots.lighting: soft golden sunrise light through paper windows
shots.narration_line: On a soft green mountain, little Pobi opened his eyes to a brand-new morning.
shots.narration_cue: start softly after the first half-second
shots.sfx_notes: light breeze, soft blanket rustle, tiny morning birds

shots.title: Pobi walks to breakfast
shots.subject: Pobi, the same panda cub
shots.action: waddles happily along a forest path toward a bamboo grove
shots.setting: a misty bamboo forest with dew on the leaves
shots.lighting: fresh morning light with soft haze
shots.narration_line: His tummy gave a tiny rumble, so he set off to find the freshest bamboo in the forest.
shots.narration_cue: land the second clause as he reaches the grove
shots.sfx_notes: gentle footsteps on leaves, soft forest ambience

shots.title: Crunchy bamboo breakfast
shots.subject: Pobi, the same panda cub
shots.action: takes a big crunchy bite of fresh bamboo and smiles with delight
shots.setting: a bright bamboo grove filled with fresh green leaves
shots.lighting: clean daylight with soft highlights on the leaves
shots.narration_line: Crunch, crunch, crunch. Pobi's breakfast was cool, sweet, and delicious.
shots.narration_cue: let the first crunch happen before the narration starts
shots.sfx_notes: clear bamboo crunch, leaf rustle, soft happy hum

shots.title: Sharing with friends
shots.subject: Pobi, the same panda cub, with a tiny red bird, a rabbit, and a shy deer
shots.action: shares berries, apples, and tender leaves with the forest friends
shots.setting: a sunny clearing beside the bamboo grove
shots.lighting: warm morning sunlight with soft sparkles through the trees
shots.camera_motion: slow circular move around the group
shots.narration_line: Soon everyone was smiling in the sunshine, because breakfast always tastes better when it is shared.
shots.narration_cue: deliver the final clause as the camera opens to the group
shots.sfx_notes: soft chirps, friendly nibbling, gentle musical swell
